modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access email on mail.usd.edu in browser.

full_description_text:  
- The user reported an issue accessing their email on mail.usd.edu.  
- They mentioned that while they can view their email in Outlook, the browser access fails with an error message stating, "Something went wrong. Please try again later."  
- This issue seems to be isolated to the browser interface, as Outlook is functioning properly.
short_description: Unable to access email on mail.usd.edu in browser.
description:
